commit_message: chore: remove legacy iAR CLI commands after Typer alias stabilization - Drop @app.command registrations for `issue-from-prd`, `run-once`, `review-once`, and `recover-publish` from `backend.api.cli_typer.py` so the new Typer aliases (`iar issue create`, `iar run`, `iar review`, `iar recover`) are the only entry points. Update `README.md`, `docs/guides/agent-runner.md`, archived and pending PRD/task docs, and `tests/test_agent_runner_cli.py` to drop legacy command references while keeping the real `blocked-continue` command and its tests intact. Resolve rebase conflicts from rebasing onto the post-evidence/agent-runner-workflow HEAD (PR #52, blocked-continue, evidence parsing, etc.) by re-adding the `blocked-continue` Typer registration alongside the new `recover` command, deleting the obsolete `20260527-162000-prd-agent-runner-unified-entry.md` pending file that was already removed by `3049cce`, and updating pending/archived task docs to drop `run-once`/`recover-publish` references in favor of the current CLI surface.
